title: liatris spicata var. resinosa
intro: Liatris spicata var. resinosa, also known as resinous blazing star, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to North America. The medicinal properties of Liatris spicata var. resinosa include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Liatris spicata var. resinosa include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
